subject: Stripe Capital — Sr PM role (no prior application)
body:
Hi Jane,

Alex from Stripe Capital here. I came across your work on Mercury's API platform and your earlier Plaid identity-API scaling — both directly relevant to a Sr PM role we're hiring for on the Capital team (lending infrastructure for SMBs).

Would you be open to a 20-minute call to learn more? Happy to share comp and team details in advance if it helps.

Best,
Alex

_expected._notes: No prior application by the user → recruiter-outbound, NOT screen. Action is reply-info (express interest or graceful decline).
